mapper.select: SELECT u.total_user, u.NOT_APPROVED_ORGAN_USER, u.total_organ_user, o.organ_count, ap.uncomplete_volun_act, va.TOTAL_VOLUN_ACT FROM (SELECT count(*) AS total_user, count(CASE WHEN user_status = 2 AND user_type = 2 THEN 1 END) AS NOT_APPROVED_ORGAN_USER, count(CASE WHEN user_type = 2 THEN 1 END ) AS total_organ_user FROM TBL_USER tu ) u, (SELECT count(*) AS organ_count FROM tbl_organ tbo) o, (SELECT count(DISTINCT tva.VOLUN_ACT_NO ) AS uncomplete_volun_act FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY tva WHERE tva.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE = 0) ap, (SELECT count(*) AS total_volun_act FROM tbl_volun_activity) va
SELECT tu.user_no, tu.ORGAN_NAME, tu.user_name , tu.USER_ID , tu.USER_EMAIL FROM tbl_user tu WHERE tu.user_type = 2 AND tu.user_status = 2

SELECT rnum, user_no,user_name, organ_name, user_id, user_email, organ_no FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, subquery.* FROM (SELECT tu.user_no, tu.ORGAN_NAME, tu.user_name , tu.USER_ID , tu.USER_EMAIL , toc.ORGAN_NO FROM tbl_user tu LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN_CERT toc ON toc.USER_NO = tu.user_no WHERE tu.user_type = 2 AND tu.user_status = 2 ORDER BY tu.user_no DESC ) subquery ) where rnum between #{startRow} and #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER tu WHERE tu.user_type = 2 AND tu.user_status = 2

SELECT tu.user_no, tu.ORGAN_NAME, tu.user_name , tu.USER_ID , tu.USER_EMAIL , tu.user_birth, toc.ORGAN_NO, tbo.organ_cert_num, toc.organ_file_system_name, toc.organ_file_original_name FROM tbl_user tu LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN_CERT toc ON toc.USER_NO = tu.user_no JOIN TBL_ORGAN tbo on toc.organ_no = tbo.organ_no WHERE tu.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.update: Update tbl_user set user_status = 1, organ_no = #{organNo} where user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USER WHERE user_no = #{userNo} and user_status = 2
mapper.select: select * from (select rownum as rnum ,subquery.* from (SELECT tva.volun_act_no as volunActNo, tbo.organ_name as orgName, tva.volun_act_proc_end as volunActProcEnd, tva.volun_act_organ_no as volunActOrganNo FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN tbl_organ tbo ON tva.VOLUN_ACT_ORGAN_NO = tbo.ORGAN_NO WHERE EXISTS (SELECT tva2.VOLUN_ACT_NO FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY tva2 WHERE tva2.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE = 0 ) ORDER BY tva.volun_act_proc_end) subquery ) where rnum <= 5
select tu.user_No, tu.user_email from tbl_user tu where tu.organ_no = #{organNo} and tu.user_status=1 order by tu.user_last_login
